message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.heaviside passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-i4ck)

Expose fnp_python.heaviside delegating to numpy.heaviside(x1, x2).
Parity test covers:
- negative/zero/positive regions with scalar x2 (0.0, 0.5, 1.0)
- integer input dtype promotion parity
- x2 broadcast as per-element array of midpoint values
- NaN propagation (equal_nan comparison)
- 2-D input element-wise
